violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as raw beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as tofu) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC corrected by moving tofu above raw beef. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Ground rice, rice, fresh herbs, etc packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
Various food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
Inspector observed litter, debris, and clutter outside near the walk-in cooler/freezer. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
The hand-washing sink in the meat prep area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

Raw animal foods (such as raw meats) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as tofu) in the walk-in refrigerator and retail open case cooler). Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (meat bandsaw and ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

Tripe was observed thawing at the 3 bay sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

Rice, ground roasted rice, and fresh herbs packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
Inspector observed several fly strips with dead insects hanging throughout establishment. PIC informed to remove. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
Cases of food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer and retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
Inspector observed ashes and container of ashes stored on top of cases of food outside. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the meat prep area. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
Knife located in the meat prep area was not in good repair (duck taped handle). New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -Meat case in the meat prep area; -Retail shelves and open case coolers; -Walk-in cooler trays, shelves, fans, and ceiling. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
Inspector observed litter, debris, and clutter outside near the walk-in cooler/freezer. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

The floors behind the freezer reach-ins have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
